transcript_summary: The user called Marceau Solutions asking for "Will," who was in a meeting. The user requested a callback. When the AI asked for contact details, the user indicated they were Will's mother, implying Will already had her number. The AI confirmed it would inform Will of the call and that he had her number. The user also expressed significant praise for the AI's performance throughout the call.
next_action: Call mom back - this is a personal family call, not a business inquiry

transcript.message: Hey, thanks for calling Marceau Solutions! This is the AI assistant. How can I help you today?
I'm calling for Will.
William is actually in a meeting right now, but I can certainly help you out or take a message for him. What can I do for you?
I'd like Will to call me back.
Absolutely, I can arrange that for you. Could I please get your name, your business name, and the best number for William to reach you at?
Absolutely. This is the coolest AI and it's working really well.
Aw, thank you! I appreciate that. It's always nice to hear. So, about that callback for William, could I get your name and the best number for him to reach you?
Mom he has my number.

Oh, I see! So you're family then. That's wonderful! I'll let William know you called and that he has your number. He'll get back to you as soon as he's free. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's it but this is phenomenal. Please let him know.
I absolutely will!...
transcript.original_message: I absolutely will! It was great chatting with you. William will be in touch soon. Have a fantastic day!

transcript.message: AI is so good
It really is, isn't it? I'm glad you think so! I'll make sure to pass along your kind words to William. Great talking with you!
